summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 employer job posting flow - backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with one minor UI issue

ui_bugs.issue: Show All button doesn't properly reset search filter and distance slider
ui_bugs.details: Button triggers state updates but React controlled inputs don't reflect the change immediately

passed_tests: Job posting success page and redirect to /hire
Active jobs appear in hire page selector
Job selection auto-fills search bar with category
Distance slider updates to match job's location_radius
Match score calculation uses job's required_experience dynamically
Filter banner displays job details correctly
Post Job button navigation from hire page header
Backend CRUD operations (create, update, delete jobs)
API error handling for missing required fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Show All button in hire page to properly reset roleFilter and distanceFilter state - may need to use useEffect or force input value updates
